title: Uncraftable recipes
description: Allows to craft uncraftable items in a more balance way
body:
# Uncraftable recipes

Fabric mod that adds some recipes for uncraftable items in Minecraft

**Current items:**
- Bell
- Chainmail Armors
  - Helmet
  - Chestplate
  - Leggings
  - Boots
- Cobweb
- Elytra
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Horse Armors
  - Diamond
  - Golden
  - Iron
  - Leather
- Leather 
- Mushroom Block
  - Brown
  - Red
- Name Tag
- Saddle
- String
- Totem of Undying
- Trident

***All the recipes have been balanced to not break the game***

### Recipes
<details>
  <summary>Click here</summary>
